cover_letter_tip: Mention U.S. permanent resident work authorization clearly and briefly.
interview_focus: Proactively clarify work authorization when asked and prioritize roles that do not require citizenship-only clearance.
company_priority: Prefer commercial employers, state and local roles, universities, healthcare, finance, SaaS, and federal contractors with non-cleared positions.
avoid: Applying to roles that explicitly require U.S. citizenship, active clearance, or clearance eligibility.
